scripts.build: pnpm --filter @valuya/whatsapp-channel-access build && rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.training:seed-dialogues: pnpm run build && node dist/whatsapp-bot/src/trainingPipeline.js seed-dialogues
scripts.training:run-dialogues: pnpm run build && node dist/whatsapp-bot/src/trainingPipeline.js run-dialogues
scripts.training:collect-failures: pnpm run build && node dist/whatsapp-bot/src/trainingPipeline.js collect-failures
scripts.training:propose-improvements: pnpm run build && node dist/whatsapp-bot/src/trainingPipeline.js propose-improvements
scripts.training:apply-proposals: pnpm run build && node dist/whatsapp-bot/src/trainingPipeline.js apply-proposals
